title: . Prohibited acts.
content:
. Prohibited acts. 
a. It shall be unlawful for any employer:  
   
1. To deny any woman employee the benefits provided for in this Chapter or to discharge any 
woman employed by him for the purpose of preventing her from enjoying any of the 
benefits provided under this Code. 
   
2. To discharge such woman on account of her pregnancy, or while on leave or in 
confinement due to her pregnancy; 
   
3. To discharge or refuse the admission of such woman upon returning to her work for fear 
that she may again be pregnant.
